harmonizing-data-for-the-digital.@value:
Harmonizing Data for the
                    Digital Product Passport

proof-of-concept-not-for.@value: Proof of Concept - Not for Production Use

the-dpp-standardization-process-is.@value:
The DPP standardization process is ongoing. Utilities on this website are for demonstration and
                proof-of-concept purposes only.

this-repository-provides-a-centralized.@value:
This repository provides a centralized, harmonized vocabulary that maps the semantic equivalencies
                    between various standards (ISO, GS1, etc.) to any exact schemas that are required for the DPP. Our
                    goal is to ensure interoperability and lower the barrier for implementation, especially for SMEs.

in-addition-this-site-provides.@value:
In addition, this site provides a suite of in-browser tools to assist with DPP generation (manually
                    and in bulk) and validation of JSON files against DPP standards.

for-more-details-on-the.@value: For more details on the approach, please read the Methodology documentation.

interactive-tools-and-libraries-to.@value: Interactive tools and libraries to build, validate, and visualize Digital Product Passports.

an-interactive-web-based-form.@value:
An interactive web-based form to generate valid JSON-LD Digital Product Passports for
                            Battery, Construction, Electronics and Textile sectors. Validate your data in real-time.

standalone-tool-to-validate-dpp.@value:
Standalone tool to validate DPP JSON files against the v2 schemas. Supports both strict JSON
                            and JSONC (with comments).

batch-convert-csv-data-to.@value:
Batch convert CSV data to DPP JSON files in your browser. Map columns to schema fields and
                            export.

searchable-index-of-all-dpp.@value:
Searchable index of all DPP definitions. Find terms, units, and semantic mappings across all
                            sectors.

javascript-utilities-and-reference-imple.@value:
JavaScript utilities and reference implementations for schema validation, HTML generation,
                            and ontology indexing. Includes adapter examples for converting between formats.

the-canonical-data-models-vocabulary.@value: The canonical data models, vocabulary definitions, and validation rules for Version v2.

the-semantic-definitions-ontology-and.@value:
The semantic definitions (Ontology) and JSON-LD mappings (Contexts) that define the meaning of
                        data.

the-structural-and-constraint-validation.@value: The structural and constraint validation rules ensuring data quality.

examples-and-guides-to-help.@value: Examples and guides to help you implement the DPP.

illustrative-json-ld-examples-for.@value: Illustrative JSON-LD examples for various products.

example-of-how-a-dpp.@value: Example of how a DPP can be shared via EPCIS 2.0.

contributions-are-welcome-please-review.@value: Contributions are welcome. Please review the Contribution Guidelines and the Governance Model.

licensed-under-the-cc0-1.@value: Licensed under the CC0 1.0 Universal. | Impressum / Legal Notice
